title: Club Fair Day: Too Many Choices

sentences.en: Our school held its yearly club fair today, with every club setting up a small table to invite new members.
sentences.zh: 我們學校今天辦了年度社團博覽會，每個社團都擺了一張小桌子，邀請新成員加入。

sentences.en: The chess club table had a large image of a king and queen printed on their poster, along with a short list of instructions on how to join.
sentences.zh: 西洋棋社的桌子上貼著一張印著國王和王后的大圖片，還附上一小張如何加入的說明。

sentences.en: For instance, the chess club meets every Tuesday, and membership only costs a small fee for a used chess set.
sentences.zh: 舉例來說，西洋棋社每星期二聚會，會員費只需要付一點小錢租一副二手棋。

sentences.en: The drama club, based in the school theater, asked everyone to pose for a quick photo at their table, just for fun.
sentences.zh: 以學校劇院為活動基地的戲劇社，請每個人在他們的桌子前擺姿勢拍一張快照，純粹好玩。

sentences.en: A fellow student running the tennis club, wearing his club's white uniform, said the sport builds both patience and quick reflexes.
sentences.zh: 負責網球社的一位同學穿著社團的白色制服，說這項運動能同時培養耐心跟反應速度。

sentences.en: I told him I have zero interest in tennis specifically, but he said the club welcomes total beginners too, not just experts.
sentences.zh: 我跟他說我對網球本身完全沒興趣，但他說社團也歡迎完全的新手，不是只收高手。

sentences.en: Bernice seemed interested in almost every single table, and by the end of the fair, she had signed up for four different clubs at once.
sentences.zh: Bernice 幾乎對每一桌都感興趣，博覽會結束時，她一口氣報名了四個不同的社團。

sentences.en: One guy at the science club table let us hold a small magnet, saying it was a simple way to gain a little hands-on experience before joining.
sentences.zh: 科學社桌子那邊有個男生讓我們摸了一塊小磁鐵，說這是在加入之前先獲得一點動手經驗的簡單方式。

sentences.en: The writing club's advisor, an older student who is basically an expert at short stories, said their weekly meeting is more of a friendly discussion than a class.
sentences.zh: 寫作社的指導學長基本上是短篇小說的高手，他說他們每週的聚會比較像輕鬆的討論，不太像上課。

sentences.en: That description sounded exactly like my kind of club, so I signed up on the spot, right below Bernice's name.
sentences.zh: 這個描述聽起來完全就是我喜歡的那種社團，所以我當場就報名了，簽在 Bernice 的名字下面。

sentences.en: At the end of the fair, every new member got invited to a small welcome party next week, held right in the gym.
sentences.zh: 博覽會結束時，每個新社員都被邀請參加下星期在體育館舉行的小型歡迎派對。

sentences.en: William, hearing about clubs for the first time, immediately asked if there was a club for people who like giant robots, and sadly, there was not.
sentences.zh: 第一次聽說社團這件事的 William，馬上問有沒有喜歡巨大機器人的社團，很可惜，沒有。

quiz.question: How many clubs does Bernice sign up for by the end of the fair?
Which club does Coco decide to join?
What does William ask about after learning about clubs?
options: Whether there is a club for people who like giant robots.
Whether he can join the chess club.
Whether Perry can join a club.
